title: Button Site — Single Page with Themed Primary Button

requirements.summary: Render a single-page layout with a prominently styled, accessible primary button visible without scrolling.
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting the app loads a single page without errors.
A prominently styled button is visible without scrolling on a typical laptop viewport.
The button has an accessible label in English and is reachable via keyboard tab navigation.

file_operations.description: Create the single-page React UI that centers a hero section and renders one prominent primary action button above the fold (ensure accessible English label and keyboard focus visibility). Use the shadcn-ui Button component to provide consistent button structure and interaction states; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Add the shadcn-ui Button component implementation (or equivalent wrapper consistent with shadcn-ui conventions) so App can compose it without modifying other files under frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Implement a simple click interaction that updates on-page feedback immediately near the button.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the button updates the UI immediately without a page reload.
The feedback state is visible near the button and uses English user-facing text.

file_operations.description: Add local React state for button interaction (e.g., click counter or confirmation message) and render the feedback text directly near the button; ensure the update happens immediately without reload and uses English text.

requirements.summary: Apply a coherent, minimal landing-page visual theme (non-blue/purple primary palette) with consistent typography, spacing, and button hover/focus states.
acceptanceCriteria: Page uses a consistent set of colors and typography (not the default unstyled look).
The button styling matches the overall theme (hover/focus states included).
Theme does not rely on blue/purple as the primary palette unless explicitly required (not requested).

file_operations.description: Define global theme tokens and base styles to match the Tailwind config (CSS variables for background/foreground/primary, etc.), selecting a non-blue/purple primary palette (e.g., green/teal). Include base typography and spacing defaults so the page does not appear unstyled.

Apply consistent Tailwind utility classes for layout/typography/spacing that align with the theme, and ensure the primary button includes visible hover and focus states consistent with the overall design (using the shadcn-ui Button component); verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
